LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-20-582700 WITH CASE CGC-19-579934: GRANT. CASE CGC-20-582700 IS CONSOLIDATED WITH CGC-19-579934 FOR ALL PURPOSES. CGC-19-579934 IS DESIGNATED THE LEAD CASE NUMBER AND ALL FUTURE FILINGS SHALL BE MADE IN THAT CASE. PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSE TO THIS MOTION SHOWS THAT HE DOES NOT OBJECT TO CONSOLIDATION, BUT SEEKS DISMISSAL OF THE CITY'S ACTION. THERE IS CURRENTLY NO PROPER MOTION TO DISMISS THE CITY'S ACTION. IN ADDITION, IT IS UNCLEAR WHETHER PLAINTIFF SERVED HIS RESPONSE TO THE MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-20-582700 WITH CASE CGC-19-579934
Off Calendar Apr-01-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Eddie Stevenson, Plaintiff in propria persona.
No other appearances.

Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-20-582700 WITH CASE CGC-19-579934:

Grant. Case CGC-20-582700 is consolidated with CGC-19-579934 for all purposes. CGC-19-579934 is designated the lead case number and all future filings shall be made in that case. Plaintiff's response to this motion shows that he does not object to consolidation, but seeks dismissal of the City's action. There is currently no proper motion to dismiss the City's action. In addition, it is unclear whether plaintiff served his response to the motion to consolidate.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

Plaintiffs Motion To Dismiss Defendants Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-01-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Eddie Stevenson, Plaintiff in propria persona.
No other appearances.

Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF EDDIE STEVENSON's Motion To Dismiss Defendants Complaint is off calendar. The motion was not filed at least 16 court days before the hearing, as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b). In addition, there is no proof of service on file, as required by Cal. R. Ct. 3.1300(c).

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
